title: 10 Herbal Teas For Chronic Hepatitis
description: Ginkgo biloba teas contains flavonoids and terpenoids that may help alleviate symptoms of chronic hepatitis. The flavonoids, particularly quercetin and kaempferol, have antioxidant properties that can reduce liver inflammation and damage. They also improve blood flow to the liver, allowing it to function more efficiently. The terpenoids, such as bilobalide, have anti-inflammatory effects that can reduce liver scarring and fibrosis.
